code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("positive=#{count}")
